title: No duplicate detection on re-promotion (FIXED)
detail: promoteSessionLearnings lacked idempotency guard. Fixed by adding dedup check against existing global content before appending.

title: Gemini-cli SKILL.md parity (FALSE POSITIVE)
detail: Reviewer claimed gemini-cli SKILL.md was missing promotion steps, but grep confirms steps 5-6 are present at lines 506-508.

title: Cosmetic newline spacing in append
detail: Fixed as part of idempotency change — now uses \n\n consistently.

title: countLearningEntries silently returns 0 on error
detail: Acceptable for threshold-check use case. Consistent with convenience function pattern.
